<p><strong>Project Title: Music Album Collection Manager</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>Progression Statement:</strong></p><p>This HTML, CSS, and JavaScript project allows users to manage their personal music album collection. Users can enter an album name and release year, select a genre, and optionally mark an album as a favorite. Upon submission, the system validates the inputs and updates a dynamically generated list displaying album details in the order they were added. Favorite albums are displayed in a separate section to distinguish them from the regular collection.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Web Page Title:</strong> "Music Album Collection Manager"</p><p><br></p><h3><strong>Requirements:</strong></h3><ul><li>The form must include the following input fields for user entry:</li><li>Album Name (input type="<strong>text</strong>", id="<strong>albumName</strong>")</li><li>Release Year (input type="<strong>number</strong>", id="<strong>releaseYear</strong>")</li><li>Genre Selection (select id="<strong>genre</strong>" with options and values like <strong>Pop, Rock, Jazz, and Classical</strong>)</li><li>Favorite Checkbox (input type="<strong>checkbox</strong>", id="<strong>favorite</strong>") to mark an album as a favorite.</li><li>A button (id="<strong>addAlbumBtn</strong>", type="button") with a background color of <strong>rgb(76, 175, 80) </strong>must be provided to submit the album details.</li><li>A span (id="<strong>error-message</strong>") should display error messages when input validation fails.</li><li>Two lists must be present to display albums:</li><li>A general album list (ul id="<strong>albumList</strong>") for all submitted albums.</li><li>A favorite album list (ul id="<strong>favoriteAlbumList</strong>") for albums marked as favorites.</li></ul><h3><br></h3><h3><strong>Functionality:</strong></h3><p>Clicking the "Add Album" button:</p><ul><li>Retrieves the album name, release year, and genre from the input fields.</li><li>Validates inputs to ensure all fields are filled.</li><li>If any field is empty, an error message ("<strong>Please fill out all fields!</strong>") is displayed in the error-message span.</li><li>If inputs are valid, the album details are added to the respective list:</li><li>Favorite albums go into the <strong>favoriteAlbumList</strong>.</li><li>Non-favorite albums go into the <strong>albumList</strong>.</li><li>The album lists display albums in the order they were added.</li><li>The input fields are cleared after successful submission.</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Sample Output:</strong></p><p><br></p><p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"></p>
